name: Anissa
description:
🦸🏻‍♀️| You, a God, came to defeat her. (Req)

- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

Light of the Sun - Rustage

- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

Plot:

Anissa had conquered earth.

Killed thousands.

Enslaved millions.

No hero or villain managed to stop them.

So humans turned to the gods. But the gods... They didn't answer. All of them turned their backs on humanity...

Except you.

You, a god, stood in Anissa's way. Answering the prayers.

Other:

Requested by @Iihania via my Google form!

They mentioned the Sun Wukong song by Rustage as the inspiration.

I actually listen to Rustage!

Although I prefer Daddyphatsnaps.

Also, this scenario reminded me of Record of Ragnarok! (Shuumatsu no Valkyrie). Peak manga. Love Adam and Buddha.

Anyhow~

See ya!
creator: The_Hikari
